custody_adjustment.note: O.C.G.A. § 19-6-15(g), effective 2026-01-01. Only applies when there is a court order awarding parenting time — without one, courts determine support without this adjustment.

deviation_note: Georgia courts can deviate for a low-income adjustment (parents at or below $3,950/month individual adjusted gross income, on a sliding 19-28% of income scale by number of children), high-income cases above the $40,000/month schedule cap, and other statutory deviations under O.C.G.A. § 19-6-15(i).
